overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character in red robes exploring a foggy coastal fishing village. The character walks past seafood drying racks, along the sandy shoreline, through a settlement of wooden huts, and out onto a long wooden pier overlooking the calm sea and distant forested hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach fish drying area with hanging seafood

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden racks of hanging fish and octopus on the sandy beach

entered.detail: wooden structures with hanging fish and octopus drying in the open air
large wooden barrel filled with fish
calm blue sea with distant boats visible through the haze
weathered wooden piers and posts extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy coastal fish drying area, passing wooden racks laden with hanging seafood and octopus. The sandy beach stretches toward the calm ocean on the left, with distant ships visible through the morning haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline with beached boats and fishing debris

events.description: leaving the fish drying area and approaching the water's edge where sand meets shallow waves

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline where wet sand meets the shallow water, navigating around beached boats

entered.detail: small wooden fishing boat resting on the sand at the water's edge
piles of netting and woven baskets scattered on the beach

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the drying racks, the character walks along the water's edge where the ocean laps at the sandy shore. Beached fishing boats and tangled nets litter the beach as the village buildings become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village path with wooden huts and debris

events.description: moving from open beach into the village area with wooden structures and huts

agents.ego_description: walking through the fishing village past rustic wooden huts and scattered construction debris

entered.detail: rustic wooden shack with stairs and thatched roof elements
scattered wooden boards and logs piled on the sandy ground
wooden tripod with burning flame providing light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village proper, navigating between wooden fishing huts and stepping over scattered planks and debris. A burning torch stands near one of the buildings as the path leads toward a wooden pier extending into the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over calm water with village views

events.description: stepping onto the wooden pier and walking over the water away from the shore
character stops at the end of the pier and looks around at the coastal village and hills

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier past moored boats, then stopping at the end to observe the village and forested coastline

entered.detail: long weathered wooden walkway extending over the turquoise water
small wooden boat with lantern tied alongside the pier
cluster of wooden buildings and docks along the shoreline
tree-covered mountains rising behind the village in the mist

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a long wooden pier extending over the calm turquoise water, passing a moored fishing boat with a lantern. Reaching the end of the pier, the character stops to take in the view of the coastal village nestled against forested hills, with the morning mist hanging over the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty fish-drying area through a coastal settlement and out onto a pier overlooking the sea. It begins by following the character past wooden racks of hanging seafood and octopus on a sandy beach, where distant ships are barely visible through the morning haze. As the camera moves away from the racks, the scene shifts to the water's edge, passing beached fishing boats and tangled nets as the village buildings emerge from the fog. The path then leads into the heart of the settlement, navigating between wooden huts and scattered debris past a burning torch before turning toward a long wooden pier. Finally, the camera follows the character across the pier over turquoise water and past a moored lantern-lit boat, coming to a stop at the edge to reveal the village nestled against forested hills under a lingering mist.
